channel.title: Desktop on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Desktop on Arrans github.io

item.title: HeyPuter/puter
item.description: 🌐 The Web OS! Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hostable.

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is a declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, or JavaScript apps.

item.title: microsoft/PowerToys
item.description: Windows system utilities to maximize productivity

item.title: dotnet/maui
item.description: .NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

item.title: Nheko-Reborn/nheko
item.description: Desktop client for Matrix using Qt and C++20.

item.title: dweymouth/supersonic
item.description: A lightweight and full-featured cross-platform desktop client for self-hosted music servers

item.title: Shabinder/SpotiFlyer
item.description: Kotlin Multiplatform Music Downloader, Supports Spotify / Gaana / Youtube Music / Jio Saavn / SoundCloud.

item.title: Adrianotiger/desktopPet
item.description: Remembering the lovely eSheep (stray sheep) from 1995 -

item.title: oOthkOo/whatsapp-desktop
item.description: Unofficial WhatsApp Desktop Client for OSX, Linux and Windows. Build with Electron.

item.title: FyshOS/fynedesk
item.description: A full desktop environment for Linux/Unix using Fyne

item.title: go-flutter-desktop/go-flutter
item.description: Flutter on Windows, MacOS and Linux - based on Flutter Embedding, Go and GLFW.

item.title: arran4/send-to-google-photos
item.description: A desktop utility to help easily upload files to google photos from what ever shell

item.title: arran4/lemmy_notify
item.description: Lemmy Notification app - for desktop atm
